summary: Tested Friends and Connections features including Friends tab, Requests tab (incoming/outgoing), drink acceptance flow, cancel outgoing friend request, and test user population in venues. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly.

friends_tab_in_connections.description: Friends tab is visible in Connections page (data-testid='friends-tab'), displays friends list or empty state

requests_tab_incoming_outgoing.description: Requests tab shows both incoming and outgoing friend requests with correct structure

cancel_outgoing_request.description: Cancel button on outgoing friend requests works - shows toast 'Friend request cancelled'

drink_acceptance_flow.description: Accepting drink offer now correctly sets status='accepted' which enables chat unlock

add_friend_creates_pending_request.description: POST /api/friends/add creates a pending request, not an instant add - requires acceptance
add_friend_creates_pending_request.tested_endpoint: POST /api/friends/add creates pending request, receiver sees in incoming

test_users_in_venue.description: Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex appear in venue when populated via test endpoint

passed_tests: test_friend_requests_returns_incoming_outgoing - Returns both incoming and outgoing arrays
test_accept_drink_offer - Drink acceptance via POST /api/drink-token/{id}/accept works
test_populate_venue - Fake users added to venue successfully
test_get_fake_users - Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex all available
test_get_drinks_incoming_outgoing - Returns incoming and outgoing drink arrays
test_chat_status_after_drink_accept - Chat should be unlocked after drink accept
test_get_glances_incoming_outgoing - Returns incoming and outgoing glances
test_get_chat_requests_incoming_outgoing - Returns incoming and outgoing chat requests

ui_tests_verified.friends_tab: Visible in Connections page, shows empty state or friends list
ui_tests_verified.requests_tab: Shows 'Sent Requests' section with pending outgoing requests and Cancel button
ui_tests_verified.drinks_tab: Shows received drinks with 'Accepted' status (Mia, Alex visible)
ui_tests_verified.cancel_button: Clicking Cancel shows 'Friend request cancelled' toast and removes request
ui_tests_verified.test_users_in_venue: Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex visible in Who's Here with age and action buttons

bug_fixed_verification.description: drink-token accept endpoint now sets both status='accepted' and is_accepted=True
bug_fixed_verification.fix_verified: check_chat_unlocked() at line 216-220 looks for status='accepted' which is now properly set

critical_code_review_comments: Friends tab moved from Settings to Connections page - correctly implemented
Friend requests endpoint returns both incoming/outgoing - matches frontend expectations
Cancel friend request endpoint properly checks user1_id matches current user
Drink token accept now sets status='accepted' AND is_accepted=True for compatibility
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_friends_connections.py - Created comprehensive test suite for friends/connections

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tabs and features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test drinks from fake users (Mia, Alex) created during testing via /api/test/generate-drink
context_for_next_testing_agent: Friends and Connections features fully tested. Friends tab is in Connections page (not Settings). Requests tab shows both incoming and outgoing with cancel functionality. Drink token acceptance properly sets status='accepted' for chat unlock. Test users (Sophie, Liam, Mia, Alex) can be populated via POST /api/test/populate-venue/{venue_id}. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_friends_connections.py covers all friend request functionality.
mocked_api_note: Google Places API falls back to seeded venue data when GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY is not set
